# EheMehe.lk

EheMehe.lk is a Sri Lankan classified marketplace for buying, selling, and discovering products, vehicles, property, jobs, and services.

## Main public pages
- Home: https://www.ehemehe.lk/
- Browse all ads: https://www.ehemehe.lk/search
- Categories: https://www.ehemehe.lk/categories
- Safety guidance: https://www.ehemehe.lk/safety
- Terms: https://www.ehemehe.lk/terms
- Privacy: https://www.ehemehe.lk/privacy
- Contact: https://www.ehemehe.lk/contact

Public listing pages may change frequently. Private dashboard, admin, authentication, and API routes should not be indexed or treated as public content.
